testcase.name: test_partner_signup_email_provider_zoho

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected provider=zoho_mail, got: mocked assert 'mocked' == 'zoho_mail'
- zoho_mail + mocked

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter258_email_zoho_fallback.py:120: in test_partner_signup_email_provider_zoho assert log.get("provider") == "zoho_mail", f"Expected provider=zoho_mail, got: {log.get('provider')}" E AssertionError: Expected provider=zoho_mail, got: mocked E assert 'mocked' == 'zoho_mail' E E - zoho_mail E + mocked

testcase.name: test_partner_signup_email_status_sent

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected status=sent, got: failed | error: Zoho token refresh failed: Client error '400 ' for url 'https://accounts.zoho.com/oauth/v2/token' For more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400 assert 'failed' == 'sent'
- sent + failed

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter258_email_zoho_fallback.py:127: in test_partner_signup_email_status_sent assert log.get("status") == "sent", f"Expected status=sent, got: {log.get('status')} | error: {log.get('error_message')}" E AssertionError: Expected status=sent, got: failed | error: Zoho token refresh failed: Client error '400 ' for url 'https://accounts.zoho.com/oauth/v2/token' E For more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400 E assert 'failed' == 'sent' E E - sent E + failed

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected zoho_mail, got: mocked assert 'mocked' == 'zoho_mail'

testcase.name: test_resend_partner_email_status_sent

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected sent, got: failed | error: Zoho token refresh failed: Client error '400 ' for url 'https://accounts.zoho.com/oauth/v2/token' For more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400 assert 'failed' == 'sent'
- sent + failed

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter258_email_zoho_fallback.py:194: in test_resend_partner_email_status_sent assert log.get("status") == "sent", f"Expected sent, got: {log.get('status')} | error: {log.get('error_message')}" E AssertionError: Expected sent, got: failed | error: Zoho token refresh failed: Client error '400 ' for url 'https://accounts.zoho.com/oauth/v2/token' E For more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400 E assert 'failed' == 'sent' E E - sent E + failed

testcase.name: test_customer_signup_email_provider_zoho

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected provider=zoho_mail (platform fallback), got: mocked. This would fail if tenant has no email provider and fallback is broken. assert 'mocked' == 'zoho_mail'
- zoho_mail + mocked

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter258_email_zoho_fallback.py:247: in test_customer_signup_email_provider_zoho assert log.get("provider") == "zoho_mail", ( E AssertionError: Expected provider=zoho_mail (platform fallback), got: mocked. This would fail if tenant has no email provider and fallback is broken. E assert 'mocked' == 'zoho_mail' E E - zoho_mail E + mocked

testcase.name: test_customer_signup_email_status_sent

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected sent, got: failed | error: Zoho token refresh failed: Client error '400 ' for url 'https://accounts.zoho.com/oauth/v2/token' For more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400 assert 'failed' == 'sent'
- sent + failed

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter258_email_zoho_fallback.py:256: in test_customer_signup_email_status_sent assert log.get("status") == "sent", f"Expected sent, got: {log.get('status')} | error: {log.get('error_message')}" E AssertionError: Expected sent, got: failed | error: Zoho token refresh failed: Client error '400 ' for url 'https://accounts.zoho.com/oauth/v2/token' E For more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400 E assert 'failed' == 'sent' E E - sent E + failed
